heading: Step 3:  Add options to optimize query performance.
body:
If you want to optimize your query performance on a large dataset, you can add the following
options to your index definition to limit the amount of data that your MongoDB Search query must traverse:

**NumPartitions-syntax:**

numPartitions

Use the [numPartitions](fts-index-partition) option to configure partitions for your index.
When you partition your index, MongoDB Search automatically distributes the index objects between sub-indexes in an optimal way.

```json
{
  "numPartitions": <integer>,
}
```

**StoredSource-syntax:**

storedSource

Use the [storedSource](fts-stored-source-definition) option to specify fields in the source document that MongoDB Search must store.

```json
{
  "storedSource": true | false | {
    "include" | "exclude": [
      "<field-name>",
      ...
    ]
  }
}
```
